query: How do I change the card you charge me on?
positive: You can change the credit card on file under Settings, Billing, Payment method.
negatives: Upgrade or downgrade your plan under Settings, Billing, Change plan.
Change your account email under Settings, Profile, Email, then confirm via the verification link.
To reset your password, click Forgot password on the login page and follow the link sent to your email.

query: Where do I get a copy of my old bills?
positive: Download past invoices from Settings, Billing, Invoices.
negatives: Refunds are available within 14 days of purchase. Contact billing support to request one.

query: I want to stop my subscription
positive: Cancel your plan anytime from Settings, Billing, Cancel subscription. Access continues until the period ends.
negatives: Permanently delete your account from Settings, Privacy, Delete account. This cannot be undone.
Upgrade or downgrade your plan under Settings, Billing, Change plan.
You can change the credit card on file under Settings, Billing, Payment method.

query: How can I make my login more secure with a code?
positive: Turn on two-factor authentication in Settings, Security to require a one-time code at login.
negatives: To reset your password, click Forgot password on the login page and follow the link sent to your email.
